assertions.name: feynman_prompt
assertions.description: Phase 1 asks user to explain Bethe-Bloch Formula in their own words

assertions.name: feedback_identifies_omissions
assertions.description: Phase 1 feedback identifies key omissions from simulated response (beta-gamma dependence, minimum ionizing particles, density/shell corrections)

assertions.name: three_followup_questions
assertions.description: Phase 1 generates exactly 3 follow-up probing questions

assertions.name: five_adversarial_questions
assertions.description: Phase 2 generates 5 adversarial questions with correct type distribution (2 trick, 2 cross-concept, 1 exam-style)

assertions.name: cross_concept_uses_wikilinks
assertions.description: Cross-concept questions reference actual wikilinks from the Bethe-Bloch Formula note (TPC, Scintillation Detector, Particle Identification, etc.)

assertions.name: english_correction
assertions.description: Output includes English language correction/feedback section
